title: pluchea ovalis
intro: Pluchea ovalis, also known as the Oriental Bugloss or Small Bugloss, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to tropical Asia and widely cultivated in various parts of the world for its medicinal and ornamental values. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are harnessed to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Pluchea ovalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Pluchea ovalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
